description: The practice of working together harmoniously toward shared goals. Cooperation encompasses coordinated action, the smooth interplay of different roles, mutual support in common endeavor, and the understanding that together we accomplish more than alone.
rationale: The word 'soli' combines the clear, unified 'so' with the flowing life of 'li'. This pairing suggests clarity of purpose flowing into living action. The simple structure reflects cooperation's straightforward essence - clear agreement leading to flowing work.
